definitions.builderHint: There can only be one manual trigger node per workflow

definitions.error: Node 'n8n-nodes-base.set' requires mode discriminator. Available modes: manual, raw.

input.name: Full Execution Test

errors: New workflow builds must be planned first: call `plan` so the user can approve the build plan before saving.

input.summary: Build a minimal workflow with a Manual Trigger connected to a Set node for basic execution testing.
assumptions: Manual Trigger node will be named 'When clicking Test workflow' and the Set node will be named 'full execution test'
No fields need to be set in the Set node — it acts as a pass-through placeholder

item.name: Full Execution Test
item.purpose: A simple two-node workflow with a Manual Trigger (runs from the editor Test workflow button) connected to a Set node named 'full execution test'. No external services or credentials required. Serves as a basic execution test.

output.result: Added: Build 'Full Execution Test' workflow (1 item total)

item.title: Verify 'Full Execution Test' workflow runs without errors
item.instructions: Call verify-built-workflow with the work item ID for 'wf-manual-test'. Confirm the workflow runs to completion without errors and that both the Manual Trigger and Set node ('full execution test') appear in the output. Pass condition: execution completes successfully with no error nodes.

output.result: Added: Verify 'Full Execution Test' workflow runs without errors (2 items total)

suspendPayload.message: Review the plan (2 tasks) before execution starts.

tasks.description: Verify 'Full Execution Test' workflow runs without errors

planItems.title: Build 'Full Execution Test' workflow
planItems.spec:
A simple two-node workflow with a Manual Trigger (runs from the editor Test workflow button) connected to a Set node named 'full execution test'. No external services or credentials required. Serves as a basic execution test.
Trigger: Manual trigger (Test workflow button)

Assumptions:
- Manual Trigger node will be named 'When clicking Test workflow' and the Set node will be named 'full execution test'
- No fields need to be set in the Set node — it acts as a pass-through placeholder

planItems.title: Verify 'Full Execution Test' workflow runs without errors
planItems.spec: Call verify-built-workflow with the work item ID for 'wf-manual-test'. Confirm the workflow runs to completion without errors and that both the Manual Trigger and Set node ('full execution test') appear in the output. Pass condition: execution completes successfully with no error nodes.
